mapper.select: SELECT w.task_classification_id , w.company_id , w.work_name AS work_name , NULL AS priority_name , w.default_yn , w.using_yn FROM work_classification w JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = w.company_id UNION ALL SELECT t.task_priority_id , t.company_id , NULL AS work_name , t.priority_name AS priority_name , t.default_yn , t.using_yn FROM task_priority t JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = t.company_id ORDER BY 1
